mapper.select:
select * from cuser
and `id` = #{id} and `username` like concat('%', #{username}, '%') and `password` like concat('%', #{password}, '%') and `name` like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and `avatar` like concat('%', #{avatar}, '%') and `role` like concat('%', #{role}, '%') and `phone` like concat('%', #{phone}, '%') and `email` like concat('%', #{email}, '%')
order by id desc
